changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Convert TEXT columns to JSONB for better JSON query performance (cql_evaluations already converted in migration 0007)
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE cql_libraries ALTER COLUMN elm_json TYPE jsonb USING CASE WHEN elm_json IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN elm_json = '' THEN NULL ELSE elm_json::jsonb END;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE cql_libraries ALTER COLUMN elm_json TYPE text USING elm_json::text;

changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Add GIN indexes on JSONB columns for complex JSON queries

changeSet.author: data-model-validation
changeSet.comment: Add index on status for filtering failed evaluations
